scripts.test: pnpm native:deps && pnpm -r test && pnpm test:scripts
scripts.test:scripts: pnpm authoring:contract:check && vitest run --root scripts && node scripts/check-config-write-validation.mjs && node scripts/check-count-queries.mjs && node scripts/check-readiness-failing-paths.mjs && node scripts/check-file-size.mjs
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @ductum/core build && pnpm --filter @ductum/mcp build && pnpm --filter @ductum/harness build && pnpm -r lint
scripts.dev: pnpm build && concurrently -n api,dash -c blue,green "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:dash"
scripts.build:watch: concurrently -k -n core,mcp,harness,api,cli -c gray,gray,gray,blue,gray "pnpm --filter @ductum/core exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "pnpm --filter @ductum/mcp exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "pnpm --filter @ductum/harness exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "pnpm --filter @ductum/api exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "pnpm --filter @ductum/cli exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput"
scripts.dev:hot: pnpm build && concurrently -k -n watch,serve -c gray,green "pnpm build:watch" "node scripts/serve.mjs --api-watch"
